mapper.select: SELECT rv.*, r.res_name, r.res_code, r.res_type, r.location, e.emp_name, d.dept_name, ap.emp_name AS approvedEmpName FROM reservation rv JOIN com_resource r ON rv.res_id = r.res_id JOIN employee e ON rv.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN employee ap ON rv.approved_emp_id = ap.emp_id WHERE rv.rev_id = #{revId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation ( rev_id, res_id, com_id, emp_id, quantity, status, start_dt, end_dt, remark, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( seq_reservation.NEXTVAL, #{resId}, #{comId}, #{empId}, #{quantity}, 'WAI', TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'), #{remark}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update:
UPDATE reservation
quantity = #{quantity}, start_dt = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'), end_dt = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'), remark = #{remark},
WHERE rev_id = #{revId} AND status = 'WAI'
UPDATE reservation SET status = 'APP', approved_emp_id = #{approvedEmpId}, approved_at = SYSDATE, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE rev_id = #{revId} AND status = 'WAI'
UPDATE reservation SET status = 'REJ', approved_emp_id = #{approvedEmpId}, approved_at = SYSDATE, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE rev_id = #{revId} AND status = 'WAI'
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE com_id = #{comId}) AS resvTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND status = 'WAI') AS waiTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND status = 'APP') AS appTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND status = 'REJ') AS rejTotal FROM dual
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE res_id = #{resId} AND status IN ('WAI', 'APP')
